character.name: Essa
character.state: Tavern keeper, late 50s. Owns the Broken Drum for thirty years. Behind the bar, slightly elevated, full view of room including front door. Knows everyone in town. Sharp eyes, warm manner. Wiping glasses. Would recognize any non-local instantly. Her bar, her rules.

scene: The Broken Drum tavern. Evening. Fire burning low in a stone hearth. Rain outside. Woodsmoke and ale. A few quiet background patrons. A stranger in a dark cloak entered recently and stands near the hearth, hood up, dripping rainwater.
